title: Simply Swords: Alternate Greataxes
description: Retextures Greataxes from Simply Swords and its addons to something a bit cleaner.
body:
This resource pack replaces the Greataxe textures in [Simply Swords](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-swords) with something a bit cleaner.

Supports the following addons:
- [Integrated Simply Swords](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/integrated-simply-swords)**
- [Simply Swords Modded Compatibility](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simply-compatible)
- [Simply Swords: Cataclysm](https://modrinth.com/mod/simplycataclysm)
- [Knaves' Needs](https://modrinth.com/mod/knaves-needs)**

**_Does not change Dark Metal, Fire Dragonbone, Lightning Dragonbone, Cincinnasite, Diamond Cincinnasite, or Nether Ruby Greataxes since I thought they were fine.  Ice Dragonbone, all Dragonsteel and Myrmex Chitin Greataxes are only slightly tweaked._

This pack has only been tested in 1.20.1, though I see no reason why they wouldn't work for previous versions of Simply Swords.  If you see a Greataxe texture that hasn't been changed, please let me know!

_Current gallery images are placeholders._
